results.rendered_html:
abhi-√mṛś P. (1. pl. -mṛśāmasi; Ved. Inf. -mṛśe,  RV. ii, 10, 5 )
to touch, come in contact with,  RV.  &c.: Ā. -mṛśate id.,  RV. i, 145, 4 , &c.:
Caus. to cause to touch,  ŚāṅkhŚr. :
Intens. (p. -marmṛśat) ‘to intend to bring in contact with one's self’, to long for (acc.),  RV. iii, 38, 1 ;
( AitBr. )
